channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: TICK TOCK WAGIE! — 27 replies — 108.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TICK TOCK WAGIE!

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-04-12 03:25 UTC

OP

THOSE 48 HOURS WILL PASS IN A FLASH!

Early replies (first 3)

62102448
Jokes on you Jeff I’m a NEET

62102449
Jeff here, keep trying your best. save your money and retire early like me.

62102456
Jokes on you I'm working saturday and sunday and 7 more days after that.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102511
Jokes

62102526
Im so close to autonomy
(Not really)

62102538
>>62102446
All those shekels, yet he can't even get a wig.

62102617
>>62102456

62103304
>>62102446
Sorry Jeff, I can't find a job.

62103307
Cant wait to crush the wagies on Monday at 7 am

62103321
It will pass in a flash, just like the time when you had hair

62103325
>>62103321
very funny wagie, we could use that sense of humour down at the warehouse. See you 0600 Monday morning

62103361
who really care about hair when you have this much money? fucking poorwagies coping

62103444
>>62103321
>”Yeah well umm umm, I at least have hair and you don’t”

I’m sure Jeff just shed a tear from his yacht in the Mediterranean

62103475
>>62103325
what kind of child sacrificing tie knot is that shit

62103566
>>62103361
Same people that go “muh wife and kids.”

62103627
>>62102446
Everyday is Groundhog Day for us NEETs

62103659
based jeff, lord of the wagecage

62103714
I'm shitting on the clock right now, getting paid overtime.

62104042
does anyone have any good shoes for warehouse slaving
My feet fucking hurt I can't stand it

62104869
>>62103361
>I have money I have a 2/10 wife and I work 24/7 what do you have?
Damn Jeff, relax... It's not that bad.

62104912
>>62102446
jeff was a wagie for 40 years

62105192
>>62102446
Don't overspend on the weekend, wagie, that $8.50 a gallon fuel won't pay for itself

62105293
TOTAL WAGIE DEATH

62105340
>>62102446
The lord of wagies has spoken

62105705
>>62102446
would you look at grocery prices. You'll have to start meal prepping, wagie, no way you can afford your daily commute and a bought lunch. I see Walmart has specials on brocoli and rice

62105709
>>62102456
Make hay while the sun shines, eh wagie?

62105783
>>62102446
My lord the wagecucks are filtering your posts

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 295 replies — 83.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 295 • Updated: 2026-04-12 00:07 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62087587
>>62087253
>>62087258
So, what's your point exactly? Thank you for the bump

62087811
>>62087587
My point is, Lark Davis has forsaken you. It's ogre.

62088494
>>62087811
Ok, that's great you informed us. And so what's your point again? I still don't see it.

62088504
>>62087811
Like, how does that do anything for me or anyone? Like what's your point in regard to how that affects DOT? Or anything? I really don't see a connection

62089608
I hope you guys slurped the bottom. We're cooking now, boys.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62091358
1.33>13 DECEMBER

62093297
>>62085250
>and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers
Actually, even this is not completely really true to be honest. The whole point of DOT 1.0 was to be able to make L2s. That was done and complete and there's like 40 L2s running on DOT. Then DOT 2.0 came and with it came Asset hub. Asset hub is a COMMON GOOD L2 that can run, as you've mentioned, EVM smart contracts and also PVM smart contracts which are SUPERIOR to EVM because the use the RISC-V architecture. You literally make it seem like launching EVM compatibility is a bad choice where in reality it's a move forward in order to make the chain more flexible.

https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864 Deploy Universal Deterministic Deployment Proxy (CREATE2 Factory) on Asset Hub
This ref passed today making it so that people can launch their EVM smart contracts on the same address as they have on ETH or other L2s. So Uniswap will soon launch on Asset Hub on the same address as they're on ETH or any other L2.

62093456
>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.

62093506
>>62093456
>>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.
Actually I'm from Mumbai and Gavin Wood is paying the Mumbai warrior gang to keep the thread alive. I've already collected 11.5k DOT and every day after day 30 I get an additional 150 DOT. The thread is 35 days old. So I got 11.5k DOT + 5*150 DOT.
P.S.: Thank you Arjun for bumping the thread and giving me an excuse to re-bump it again. I'll come over to your house later and give you the money we were talking about. Good job my young Vishnu Mumbai warrior.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62093917
>Poopman loves his gay little coin
I'm NOT a Vishnu Mumbai warrior. I'm Muslim!!!!

62094207
>>62093917
Nice, keep on bumping the thread Arjun, my little Mumbai warrior muslim living in Mumbai, the city of DOT. See you at the mosque on Sunday my little Mumbai warrior. Keep the bumps coming. I'll give you more DOT on Sunday for you effort.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094396
>>62094207
>See you at the mosque on Sunday
Friday, kaffir!

62094480
>>62094396
>Friday, kaffir!
Ah yes Arjun hajji, I have forgotten. Of course! Praise Allah, the al-ilah, all-powerful God. We are the chosen people. Everyone else is a goy. We shall rule the world with our DOTs, the crypto of Islam. Praise be Allah Christ Vishnu.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094791
>>62089608
>>62093506
>>62094480

Stop larping as an Indian

62095346
>>62094791
Good job Panjali. Bump the thread you I can bump it off your comment. Our small village of Mumbai shall eat for a year of this thread alone.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097729
Dear Mumbai warriors,

I hope you slurped the bottom. I hope you inhaled the smell for it is time. It is time to go back to where we belong. To 55$ and beyond. Mumbai warriors, it is OUR TIME.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097956
bump for polkacurry

62098919
>>62097956
Yes, my fren Rohit. We, the Mumbai Warriors, will eat the best PolkaCurry there is. We shall express gratefulness to our lord Wood while we eat with SPOONS I tell you my friend. The time where we ate with our bare hands is over Rohit. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with a metal SPOON Rohit. Today, we embark into the bright new future that was laid out thanks to our spiritual leader Lord Wood. Vishnu of the mindchain bless him. Oh Rohit, how far we have come. The Mumbai warriors shall bring the whole of Mumbai, the city of DOT, into a bright future. Soon the period of enlightenment begins. Mumbai warriors, if you can hear me, give me your best BATTLE SHOUT !!!

Shouts: "TOGETHER WE STAND UNITED AS PROUD MAN OF THE MIND CHAIN. RISE MY BRETHREN. RISE MY WARRIORS. TAKE UP YOUR ARMS AND LET'S FIGHT FOR OUT GLORIOUS LORD WOOD. FOR MUMBAI, THE CITY OF DOT AAAAAAAAAAA"

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62099150
>>62097729
Aren't you shorting DOT?

62099687
>>62099150
PSSSTTT, Panjali. Do I look like a Nintendo to you? Stop playing me and telling them the plan. Panjali, shut your mouth or no PolkaCurry for you young Vishnu mind. Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with metal spoons or with their hands? Do you want an age of enlightenment? If yes, then give us your best battle shout my young Vishnu warrior. Scream so hard that Gavin Wood, our spiritual leader, will hear your voice a top mount Hyjal.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62100207
>>62099687
based street shitting dot preacher

62101334
>>62100207
Thank you. I try my best to be the best street shitter DOT preacher. We get paid really good and therefore we eat with metal spoons and not with our hands.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102768
Remember my young Vishnus of the mindchain. THIS YEAR NOMT + JAM go live on DOT (and other major upgrades). With that DOT will position itself to be about 10 years ahead of the competition. The bull market bottom has probably already been reached. Even if we go lower it won't be for more than like 10%. Maybe we'll get a black swan event mid summer, maybe we won't. The next cycle is probably going to be THE SUPER CYCLE, THE GOLDEN BULL RUN. I would position myself in a project that has some utility like DOT. The meme coin bullshitery is OVER. People are going to go back to their roots. There is no more stupidity left in the market. If you guys can't understand that then so help you Vishnu.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102845
Just realized this thread has been up for more than a month.

62102949
>>62102845
Yes, I've been saying that I'm paid by Gavin Wood directly and that we, the Mumbai warrirors, are eating with metal spoons instead of our hands because of it!

>>62068446
>>62071796
>>62071796
>>62079572

The Mumbai warriors are winning and we're entering a time of enlightenment in Mumbai because of it. PolkaCurry for everyone. Join us

62103152
My Mumbai warriors, my young Vishnus of the mind chain. Remember. This is THE bull run. I hope you are stacking. For this bull run will decide the winners from the losers. This is the GOLDEN bull run everyone has been talking about. This is IT. The decisive moment where the projects that will become the new Nvidia, Amazon, Google. Choose wisely my young Mumbai warriors for reality is not what it seems. If a coin has no utility. If the network can't handle millions of TPS at a cheap cost then there is no point in investing into it. DOT has everything anyone would think of as an important feature to have and soon, this year, JAM and NOMT and other major upgrades will hit. It'll revolutionize what the sector STANDARD is. Soon my brethren we will be called THE CHAIN. We will be a major focal point, a nexus if you will, for the whole Web3 world. We will be the center and the bridge for every other chain. Enlightenment is upon us my Mumbai warriors. Rise my brethren, rise into a new dawn of magic.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62103167
Kafir token!

62104249
100$ END OF BULL RUN MY YOUNG VISHNU MIND CHAIN MUMBAI BRETHREN WARRIORS.

62104293
>>62103152
>>62104249

Not indian.

62105141
>>62104293
Good one Panjali. You will get many DOTs once we meet at the shrine of Gavin, in Mumbai city, the city of DOT, the city of the Mumbai warriors. Yes Panjali, we shall eat with METAL spoons. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with pride and dignity. We won't eat with our hands no more. It is done. We have evolved, we have become enlightened, we are one with existence.

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 57 replies — 78.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-04-12 02:55 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088599
>>62088526
This kind of disloyalty should be punishable by public hanging

62088666
>>62088599
yup I agree. my boss' hands were tied, he is still there, the flips are dogshit and theyve had to hire even more to try and cover all the work the American team was doing. They have a flip manager too. Not a single American on the entire ecomm fraud team. Bossman says its only a matter of time until the entire company is flips. I don't have anything against the flips, some of them were really cool. And it's not like they caused me to get laid off. Its the greedy Indian CEO who caused it. And Id much rather hear a Pilipino accent than an Indian accent if I ever had to call in to speak to customer service.

62090239
>>62088548
Grow a neck beard and get fat because it’s worked for every other cyber security worker

62090283
>>62086811
this and other anons are right. Stop focusing on getting hired and focus on making content designed to piss off glowies. That’s a market that is actually growing. AI content especially. Just look at all the popular YouTube channels. You either need to make ai slop or Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson, Jimmy Dore, Theo Von, Dave Smith type stuff. Anti-Israel content like greyzone, etc

Most people here are thinking working for the man is the answer but the right answer is destroying what the man has built

62090311
>>62088526
>No one is hiring WFH unless you're something special or have certs others cant easily get.
I’ve gotten like 5 or 6 wfh jobs between 2022-2026 just by lying on my resume. Getting offers is definitely harder than it was back then but not impossible. I think if anything I’m overqualified, hence why I’ve had so many interviews but not many offers recently, so I just took off one job and slightly extended the timeline on another one.

62090709
>>62088526
Imagine getting replace by the pagpag eater

62090732
>>62084678
Be indispensable at your job. Say you're going to move and can either work remote from home or find another job. Watch them find a way to let you work remote. Simple as.

62090748
Mine came naturally after years of working in the tech field. If you study Azure a.k.a Entra, Exchange Admin, Sharepoint Admin, InTune, ETC, you'll move from the nerd who tells retards how to reboot their computers to endpoint management or some kind of administrator. Most of those jobs can be done from anywhere. You just get a company laptop, connect to a VPN.

62090930
>>62084718
based

62091196
Got an interview coming up for a WFH job as a claims adjuster. Paid training and all. Starting off is 64k a year. Much better than my shitty county job. I hope I get it.

62091298
>>62091196
Good luck anon. I have a good feeling you’ll get it

62092902
>>62088548
>what certs?
Welding or something else actually valuable

62093225
>>62084678
You too buddy. Thank you!

62093956
>>62091196
you got this anon

62093995
>>62084678
Thanks for the image OP. I've been in a bad spot mentally lately due to some stuff that happened, but will keep going now instead of trying to convince myself to give up.

62095273
>>62093995
Bases resilient anon

62097589
>>62084678
I'm a civil engineer, originally in the office before covid, but the position turned into a WFH position during covid and we never really went back.

62097818
>>62084678
I do WFH cybersecurity for a bank but I have massive experience and credentials and have literally worked with (not at) the NSA and I was still out of work almost 2 years.
I mean it's good if you can get a job. It would help a lot if you're black or a woman and I'm not kidding.

62097824
>>62084803
>technical writing
Lol AI can already replace that entire career field.

62097830
>>62085875
>>62085904
>>62085904
>>62087410
Correct. It is a gay fake job suitable for DEI hires.
You need to do hard-core real work as a white man. Cyber is now where companies stick their women and blacks.

62097875
>>62084718
This was me but moved to Poland on 125k USD / yr.

>>62084729
There are tons of remote job sites and even lang specific ones. I shifted to golang and can't imagine anyone works from the office in this lang.

62098209
>>62097875
>Poland on 125k USD / yr.
Damn, baller. Nobody in the U.S. would even interview me for remote cybersecurity jobs unless I was in certain states.

62100225
>>62097830
>it’s for females and minorities
That’s probably why your gay ass works in cyber security

62103272
>>62084678
Bump

62103921
>>62084678
I was on Fiver years ago, got banned after I agreed with a client to just work with them over email, and ive done it ever since.

62104035
>>62084678
I work in tech and not for public companies. Startup unicorns are still usually wfh

62104258
there aren't many positions where you can "work from home" and do shit all every day. your best bet is to apply to chainlink labs

62104775
>>62103921
How did they catch you breaking the rules?

62104981
>>62104775
Fiver scans all messages on their platform between you and clients to check if youre trying to pay without going through fiver

62105685
>>62104981
Can you just exchange socials and then setup the deal that way?

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 78 replies — 62.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-04-12 02:23 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62085762
>>62084453
yeah that makes sense
just sucks because the format here is so much easier to read

62085897
fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck

62087388
>>62078703
Cuckolds of crypto

62087403
hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great

62091446
>>62078703
Cuckolds of crypto
u
c
k
o
l
d
s

o
f

c
r
y
p
t
o

62092518
>>62085762
Yeah but after 2016 a bunch of NGOs freaked out and 4chan became a huge target to destroy, so they did that and now every board is dead except for the big three and the only thing left here is a tranny Discord raiding group run by a Paki (I've unfortunately met the guy IRL). Twitter is a target too, of course, but while Elon is retarded and his pet jeets break the site, he's got 10% more of a spine than Moot ever did, so we seem to be safe for now.

62092795
If you bought the "make it stack" back in 2018. How have you not killed yourself.
Only swingies made it or big boys with their 100k stacks.

62093751
>>62087403
shut up stinkbag
you lost the game of life

62095975
>>62078703
>a singular tree

62100199
cuckolds!

62100381
>>62077089
Link is still like 7% inflation.
We still got a few years for "cheapies"
Lines right up with economic collapse time-frames tho.

62100386
>>62100381
Thought experiment:

What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?

That is why they wanted you to buy LINK instead

62100392
>>62100381
>Link is still like 7% inflation.
Bitcoin had triple digit inflation when it pumped the hardest.
ETH had 10% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Solana had over 500% inflation when it pumped the hardest.

If you want to go more recent:
Sui had 200% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Hyperliquid had 25% inflation when it pumped from rank 200+ to rank 10.

Stop being this fucking stupid.

62100973
>>62100386
>What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?


you sound like a boomer yelling at the sky
how does running up to a podium and shaking the hand of the least credible president in the united states' 250 year history accrue value to you a funding altcoin

62101022
>>62100392

so your logic is that because the top few crypto assets with mass appeal pumped x amount despite inflationary tokenomics, that means your funding coin should too?

let me state the obvious which is that there isn't enough liquidity for this happen across 30 million altcoins

should the rocks in my backyard also pump in value because gold went up?
should houses in the trailer park also pump the same as waterfront mansions because real estate went up?
should you get laid more because more women are becoming whores?

62101041
>>62100381
I’ve noticed Sergey tends to drop news when there is very bearish things happening in the world. Everything about this project seems like it wants as few eyes on it as possible. Very strange.

62101064
>>62101022
HUBRIS

62101272
>>62100973
Because my altcoin actually threatens the system

Yours is token not needed

62102231
>>62077000
So, now that OP is confirmed opposition, time to remind him: the pool is closed.

62102327
>>62077784
Revenue streams will multiple by orders of magnitude over the next few years. Price will follow naturally.

62103489
>>62101022
I didn't claim inflation means it should pump. How fucking dumb are you.

62104109
>>62103489
>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
>unable to comprehend that inflation is a death spiral when there are 0 incentives to create buying pressure
seriously, how fucking dumb are you to even use this shitty argument in 2017+9

62104717
>>62104109
>>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
Only two out of five in my list are PoW.

>>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
I'm comparing percentages.

You're literally subsaharan IQ tier.

62104804
>>62103489
>I didn't claim inflation means it should pump.

you insinuated that the market wasn't "fair" because those coins pumped and yours didn't

62104808
Adem was right.
Adem won

62104969
>>62104804
I insinuated that it's retarded to blame inflation for Link not pumping when pretty much everything that did pump had higher inflation.

62105435
>>62077423
kekin

62105506
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62105533
>>62083016
> why exactly did this site die off so quickly

Glowies deployed pic rel and won

62105587
>>62077000
XRP SUCKS and you know it, Jabroni!

item.title: Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month. — 24 replies — 50.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month.

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-04-12 03:10 UTC

OP

Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month. You have to work 87 hours of a 160 hour work month to make that on $20 an hour. Then you have to pay for food, and fuel, and insurance, and utilities...No wonder everyone is so poor

Early replies (first 3)

62105140
>>62105137
Quiet paypigs, get back to work

62105144
>>62105137
i had a roommate for 5 years and now i have my own house.

62105148
I am literally medically retard and I make $39/h. Any non retard person should be make at least $60/h, is not that hard if you are not retard.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105149
>>62105137
US salaries are 150K+ so who the fuck cares? just save up for a few years and you can buy a million dollar house retard

62105157
>he doesn’t work 40 hours a day
Ngmi

62105159
>>62105148
Have you ever considered the fact that the reason you integrate so easily into the workforce is precisely because you are retarded? No? Well that’s because you’re retarded.

62105176
>>62105144
Yeah but where?
Location location location
Anyone can own a house

62105179
>>62105149
Only 2.5% of Americans are millionaires

62105183
>>62105176
a nice part of Connecticut. good luck.

62105188
>>62105137
the zoomers trying to normalise living in their vehicles, because they're so fucking poor, will enter the thread any time now

62105190
Oh havent you heard? All you have to do is
>live with random people youve never met before
>stop buying loaves of avocado toast
>work 14 hours a day
>move out to bumfuck nowhere
>drive an hour to work
>eat rice and beans every night
>never buy anything
>work on your car every day
>go to all the trade schools
>give up your foreskin
I mean its really not hard our parents did it by 28 im not sure why its taking us so long. We must be lazy.

62105202
>>62105188
>>62105190
Fucking kek. Like clockwork. How did he know bros

62105253
>>62105137
Get a roommate, dumbass. That's how Boomers and Gen X did it.

62105268
>>62105190
>I mean its really not hard our parents did it by 28
We did it by
>live with random people youve never met before
>stop buying loaves of avocado toast
>work 8 hours a day
>eat ramen every night
>never buy anything
>work on your car every day
ezpz. Just requires a bit of self discipline, that your generation seems to lack because it is entitled and narcissistic
>im not sure why its taking us so long. We must be lazy
also entitled and narcissistic

62105280
>>62105183
Go to a good part in LA. That’s wealth.

62105380
>>62105137
>average
Meaningless statistic, median rent is what you want to worry about, retard.

62105483
>boomers owe me a luxurious house in a high-demand location

62105500
>>62105137
My sweet old landlady wants $450 a month to rent her two story bungalow w/ basement while she lives in a single story house a block away better suited for active seniors & I haven't seen her since last May. Suckle my testes.

62105511
>>62105500
you're a rentcuck, you're the one sucking dick.

RENT IS DUE

62105519
>>62105511
Checked, the rent's due when I get around to it. Cope.

62105630
>>62105137
If you wanted to buy a house, what you were supposed to do is rent a room in your twenties while aggressively saving for a 20% down payment so you don't have to live around a bunch of loser shitheads anymore.
Why would you spend 20+ years renting if you wanted to own a home?

62105642
>>62105148
I’m actually stupid as fuck and basically mentally retarded. I’m a pretty good actor though and have gotten good pretending to be smart. Make 125k

62105674
>>62105137
I retired a millionaire in my 30s without issue

62105737
>>62105137
My rent is $900/mo and I split it with a roommate.

Not my problem.

item.title: the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy — 39 replies — 27.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-04-12 02:13 UTC

OP

followed closely by NEETS that don't get pussy

then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job

it's never a good deal to have a job, work 40 hours a week in something you despise, having to be on time, bowing to your boss, dealing with shitty customers and clients, even if it gives you the money to live on your own and maybe get laid or have a gf, the humilliation is not worth it, the money doesn't fix the daily defeats that working for a wage deals to your spirit.

and then of course the lowest state of being is to wage 40 hours a week and still being a virgin, I pray for these people, they are living in hell.

I went from waging in IT and getting pussy to not waging and going back to my parents house, I haven't gotten laid in a year and I still prefer this deal over having to be on the office on time, my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.

Early replies (first 3)

62102105
>>62102068
Wtf is “get pussy?” Like a relationship aka emotional investment even if just a very casual friend? Or actual gf which is even more emotional investment?

62102115
>>62102105
getting pussy is the act of inserting your penis in a pussy, there are many methods to do this, but the act is the same.

62102119
>>62102068
> my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.
As someone who did the whole school, college and work thing, lemme tell you something. It takes about 3 years for you to feel normal. It took me about 3 years after retirement to feel like my teenager self again.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102205
>>62102165
I am sure everyone is like this even rich kids cause even rich kids grow up and try to get some form of career/job. That pressure slowly builds up and you don’t even notice it. Only when you take a step back which isnt possible for most people and people that grew up well off realize they dont need to work as hard do they realize “holy fuck, work is terrible for your health.” There is nothing healthy about being up at 7am 5 days a week.

62102213
>>62102190
> wageslave
Your problem is wage slave, not pussy. lol.
You aren’t fucking her 24/7. Youre just a slave to pussy.

62102241
>>62102068
See?
This is the mentality of the guy talking about “getting pussy” which just means having a gf. lol. And it implies so much shit. Texting talking and emotions. Throw in the average girl having more options for sex than the average guy and its a disaster for most guys. Bending over backwards and not realizing it.

62102286
Booking agent asked me if I wanted to work today

I’d rather sit around the house and play video games so I said today was my one busy day, keke

62102309
>>62102205
7am

LOOOOOOOOOOOOL

Try 3am

62102376
>>62102165
it feels like drinking water when you are thirsty, or taking a huge log size shit.

I hope you escape wagedom anon, wagmi

62102390
>>62102165
it felt like a clogged stream finally being able to flow again

62102400
>>62102129
everyone pays, but neets that get laid pay less.

the average employed man drains his soul at his job pretending to care about what his coworkers think, then pretendes to care what women think too in the effort of having sex, a neet at least doesn't have to double dip being fake.

62102414
>>62102068
I'm far from a virgin, but I still feel like I belong in the lowest tier, as not getting any now. I wage (usually over 40 hours) in a job normies think is cool, yet go home tired, miserable and alone. Then I get drunk by myself to switch my brain off.

62102416
>>62102180
Whats your job?

62102547
>>62102213
Everyone is a slave to pussy
It's the better form of masturbation

Question is how much shit are you willing to take for the life size fleshlight?

62102594
>>62102119
took about nine months for me to recover but i suppose, due to the backlog of self-inventory, eventually three years as well to transition to a new skin.

62102599
>>62102068
>and then of course the lowest state of being is to wage 40 hours a week and still being a virgin, I pray for these people, they are living in hell.

Where do I fall? 70 hours a week, virgin, 41, and paying for my borderline-personality mom's nursing home. I have zero friends or hobbies and my doctor suspects I have early-onset dementia. On top of all this, I live next to a drug dealer who has kept me awake with his bullshit for the last decade.

62102628
>>62102068
>the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy
yeah, but how the fuck am I gonna get pussy as a NEET?
I have NEETbux but live at home, no car, shy introvert, etc. and I'm 35

62102631
>>62102376
I just got laid off 3 weeks ago and literally just started taking full size shits again
Before I when I was waging I was constantly constipated and would only poop once every 3 days or so.

Lost 10 lbs and literally haven’t changed shit other than golfing more

62102677
>>62102628
How did you do it before?

62102699
>>62102677
>How did you do it before?
I didn't.

62102806
>>62102599
it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

>>62102628
that is why it's the highest state

like a bodybuilder, packing muscle (sex) while shredding fat (work)

62102868
>>62102400
cope, the neet pays more with his time

62102892
>>62102806
>it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

Thank you, but the only reason I haven't kms is because I think there's a 1% chance I will burn in Hell if I do. I'm trapped in this life until I die.

62102908
>>62102868
nigga money is time if you aren't born with it, and texting a bitch is way less effort than whatever you do to eran your money.

you should see what the average dude spends directly or indirectly on women, it's tragic.

>>62102892
hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

62102943
>>62102068
>the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy
Highest state is being independently financially secure through a mysterious source of income. This includes having your own home.

>then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job
All mid. They love it, but could they financially afford to really STOP doing it at any moment? Most would say no. That might be love, but it's also necessity.

And let's not even get started on where sex havers would really be ranked (pig disgusting baka).

62103102
>>62102908
>hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

That's brutal

62103109
>>62102068
>ur in hell if u have to work & no muh dick
again what the hell is this board?

62103488
>>62102068

62103497
>>62102190
i dont understand how men end up begging for sex after months or years of relationship

i am the one who dont want to have sex with my gf after months or years of relationship

like why would i want to fuck the same pussy constantly it s so fucking boring

i only have sex with my gf when she is ovulating and i found out that she was lying about her ovulation period to get more sex from me so i told her to get ovulation tests instead of believing her ovulation calendar

if she is not pregnant before 2027 i dump her btw

62103506
>>62102631
are you me?

since i got laid off one month ago i shit massive logs

62103518
>>62102892

62103520
>>62102068
rich neet with pussy on demand is literally peak existence
unironically the modern equivalent of royalty

62105539
>>62103506
being a big shitter is shit if you are working, I need my me time to shit, relax my body and mind, then sit on the toilet for 45 minutes and push the little nigger out, can't do that when working.

item.title: AS A GOYIM WHO HAS TO DEAL WITH THE REAL WORLD — 10 replies — 19.6/hr

62105665
>>62105660
Going to prison for 10-20 years. And that’s if you don’t kill anyone

62105668
>>62105660
Dont forget to tell your fbi handler what youre doing so they can intercept you and prevent you from causing criminal damages before getting you hooked on drugs and sent to a mental asylum where you’ll be abused by the orderly staff and other drug addicts (often both)

62105677
Nothing ever happens, it's all simulation anyway, i can just kill myself afterwards. So cope and seethe all you want, your warehouse is burning on monday.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105681
bruh no wtf

62105686
>>62105665
I should hope so, for causing so much cope I'll get free food, can sleep & read all day.

62105690
>>62105665

62105708
>>62105660

62105711
>>62105660
Arson is such a retarded way to fight inequality. The only real way to fix it is to tax the fucking rich.

62105719

62105731
>>62105668

item.title: In the US there are too many well off boomers and gen X for the rest of us to catch up. — 8 replies — 9.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
In the US there are too many well off boomers and gen X for the rest of us to catch up.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-12 02:48 UTC

OP

In the US there are too many well off boomers and gen X for the rest of us to catch up. Even millennials and gen Z with high paying jobs like a doctor making $150k see pathetic gains in any given year compared to the snowball effect of their already entrenched wealth seeing compound interest and real estate appreciation, they usually work in addition to getting social security and pensions, and they get more tax benefits and free shit, plus aren't saddled with $1000+ a month student loan payments.
How do we fix this economically speaking? What's your personal strategy? Pic unrelated.

Early replies (first 3)

62105249
>>62105181
I find it funny that you're so confidently yet utterly wrong.

62105286
>>62105249
Is this adjusted for inflation tho?

62105331
>>62105181
if you had high enough IQ, you wouldve realized all the things they tried to condition you was for their benefit. Literally "We are 39 trillion in debt" is just another word for stealing your children's future. You are the consequence they made and werent wise enough to position yourself properly. Good luck as the filter is already filtering, and its not here to rid you of wealth, but moreso life.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105360
>>62105286
yes

62105543
>>62105249
I find it funny that you think that chart and your laughable interpretation of it owned me. Actually, you're the one getting owned. Destroyed, even.
https://www.federalreserve.gov/releases/z1/dataviz/dfa/distribute/chart/#quarter:145;series:Net%20worth;demographic:generation;population:all;units:levels;range:1990.3,2025.4
Boomers and gen X benefitted from the most important ways to build wealth (jobs paying middle class+ wages or successful small businesses, and real estate) being plentiful, those are now scarce and gatekept from the younger generations, a far from how boomers benefitted from their parents' generation voting for deregulation and tax cuts which helped them build wealth.
Without an explosion of new high paying jobs and cheap real estate and a massive appreciation of what little assets they do have similar to stock appreciation during the time boomers' retirement accounts were growing, it is looking like the primary way even the most high earning millennials and gen Z build wealth will be through inheritance, not their personal efforts. Which looks disturbingly similar to a new class system.

62105591
>>62105543
>chart not normalized to start of generation
So what you're saying is that people who have been acquiring wealth for more years have acquired more wealth? That's quite the stunning observation anon, nobody could have ever predicted that.

62105616
>>62105591
You're assuming years are of equivalent value between generations. A year building wealth 1970-2000 was worth far more than a year building wealth since millennials graduated college.

62105662
>>62105181
>Even millennials and gen Z with high paying jobs like a doctor making $150k see pathetic gains in any given year compared to the snowball effect of their already entrenched wealth seeing compound interest and real estate appreciation
Yeah that's how it's supposed to work you moron.
>How do we fix this economically speaking?
Wait 40 years.

item.title: A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn… — 23 replies — 6.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn…

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-04-12 00:18 UTC

OP

A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking. Does that mean if I’ve staked 2000 LINK, I’d earn $2000 per day?
Is that true, or was the anon just talking bullshit?

Early replies (first 3)

62095857
fuck stinks
hate them all
their dicks are fucking small
fuck stinks
hate them all
their token's price will fall
it really is that simple

62098788
soon …

62098818
>>62095845
>A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking.
How schizo must one be to believe this shit?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62099283
>>62095845
>basing your financial decisions based on some imaginary income that doesn't even exist

62099287
>>62095845
Didn't read, only came here to mock you and ch*inlink.

kekbaggies.

62099288
fuck every single stinkie
hate em all forever
think they're worthless and dumb yeah

62099312
>>62098788
>Sergey is the only one of all of them who ascended enough to break out to freedom.
Checks out.

62099425
Link fuddies will be tortured mercilessly and kept as pets/trophies

62099443
Link is gonna end up like this. Forgotten.

62099448
>>62099425
oh i'm so intimidated
except, for you to achieve this sick reality, first you would have to 'le win'
i.e. $1000 link
and we all know that's never gonna happen
so you lose
the end
gg
no
re

62100690
After you've made it with Chainlink, what will you tell people when they ask , 'How are you so rich?'

62100718
>>62099312
That’s anon donning the flannel. It’s symbolic you twunt.

62100787
>>62100690
Who are these people? I don’t talk to anyone so why are they asking me these questions??

62101143
the constant link psyops tell you everything you need to know.

62101887
daily reminder: fudders are shitposters

62101938
>>62101143
>>62101887
it's just every day investors calling out a shitty investment when they see one
nothing more

62101990
>>62101938
>t. gaslighting tg brownoid

62101992
>>62095845
You will reap the rewards alright linkie.

62102182
>>62095845
WHERE IS SERGAY

62102192
>>62095845
staking is literally a pyramid scheme. You can do it, but it doesn't make your 1s and 0s magically more viable as a potential use-case.

whoever said that you could make that kind of money from links is a retard, and you're a retarded faggot for believing them. Sell everything, and put all your money into JEPQ on wall st, you aren't smart enough to do this shit without losing everything to some 2bit con artist.

62102452
>>62095845
>you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking.
If this happens, I will cut off my dick and eat it on livestream. For real, no cap.

62102603
>>62102452
That would mean that the Community staking pool would receive $27.375B a year to distribute. That's not farfetched if we expect the Chainlink Network to collectively process 1 Quadrillion dollars in transactions (i.e. more than the DTCC) a year. That's 3.65*10^-3 % of the transactions. Suppose Chainlink takes 0.01% of the Quadrillion dollars as revenue for the network, 10^-4 *10^12 = 10^8. yeah we're short to be able to pay out to the staking pool which would require $27.375*10^9. Might have to cut that down to 10 cents a link a day.

62105169
>>62102603

I would be more than happy with even 10 cents a day.

ps how much for a gf like pic related ?

item.title: >filing taxes >only own index funds on Vanguard >have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite ne… — 21 replies — 6.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>filing taxes >only own index funds on Vanguard >have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite ne…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-04-12 00:35 UTC

OP

>filing taxes
>only own index funds on Vanguard
>have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite never buying the stock or selling anything
>apparently one of the mutual funds sold some minuscule amount of the portfolio (?)
>now I have to pay an extra 60 fucking dollars on turbo tax just to report a fucking $10 LOSS
FUCK THIS GAY EARTH

Early replies (first 3)

62099722
>>62099715
maybe they'll let it slide, it's a loss after all :^)

62099741
>>62099715
Imagine being so incredibly tight that you had to go and create an entire thread to kvetch over sixty shekels, get fucked you cheap fuck.

62099790
>>62099715
There are free filing options anon

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62099798
>tranime

62099880
>>62099715
Do your taxes by hand then.
I've done it for few years and i learned alot understanding how all that shit works and how i can optimize my taxes.

62099897
>>62099715
hey retard, if your income is low then you can use free software instead of turbojew
i use taxslayer which has free version for the poors

62099921
>>62099715
Why are you paying taxes on a loss

62099922
>>62099921
he needs to identify himself to the government for his trump check that will never arrive

62100178
>pay 60 bucks to report a 10 dollar loss instead of just not reporting it
>he reinvested the dividends within +/- 30 days and triggered a wash sale
>double head shot

62100220
>>62099715
is there not a personal allowance before paying tax?

62100259
I paid $650 for hr block to file my taxes. I'll shop around more next year but I just couldn't be fucked especially with the insane amount of trades I did last year

62100286
>>62099715
>paying to do your taxes
holy third world

62101093
>>62100259
You are getting fucked in your ass by your accountant. Everything is automated nowadays, just upload the forms

62101134
>>62100259
I can't fathom a world in which that's necessary. To be fair I trade futures actively and just buy and hold ETFs... but my 700+ trades in futures just get consolidated on the tax documents and it takes about 5 seconds to enter it on freetaxusa. For other stuff the PDF upload will generally grab everything and automatically fill it out. Might take a bit to get familiar with their website but it takes me 5 minutes now to get everything sent off. They charge $16 for the state filing and the federal is free.

62101196
>>62101093
Turbotax fucks up importing forms all the time, even forms from Schwab that they are supposed to be good at parsing. I spent 5 hours dealing with this bullshit this year. If you trade a lot, have a business, and your time is worth $120/hr, paying $650 is not bad.

62101252
>>62099715
you know filing is optional right? you are an american you dont have to be a slave for kikes dude

62101345
>>62101196
Your time isn't worth 120/hr, althoughbeit.

62102776
>>62100178
You either didn't actually understand what OP wrote, or you don't understand the wash sale rule, or you're just pretending to be retarded on the internet for the lulz.

62104147
Just make gemini file your taxes.

62105139
>>62101196
5x120=600
you still overpaid

62105203
>>62099715
why would you pay extra to report a tax loss lmao

Lets say usa is distancing itself from btc and crypto because ebil terrorists using it for oil toll.

62102932
>>62102780
>>62102802
>>62102824

if that white woman had the same temperament and body odor type of a japanese woman, then she'd be the perfect human.

if that japanese woman had the same temperament and body odor type of a white bitch then she'd be SEAmonkey nigger-tier.

facts.

maybe the answer is in russian asian cuties i.e. tatars (not that elliot rodger kike+seamonkey hapa shit).

62102974
>>62102805
yes, yes, I know Trump might rant-post something that will make the ((((markets)))) panic or go full bull, but wich way is it?

62102982
>>62102932
as a heterosexual man, I like my women stinky

62103027
>>62102982
>as a heterosexual man, I like my women stinky

stinky means they just have primitive digestive, excretory, endocrine, and gland systems.

are you saying you like blacks and pajeets over the less smelly whites and japanese?

62103051
>>62102780
me on the left

62103061
>>62103027
> stinky means they just have primitive digestive, excretory, endocrine, and gland systems.
Grok is this true?

62103078
>>62102780
Looks like the moon is an assmoon.

62103107
>>62102780
Fucking hell Japan.

62103236
>>62102780
BOOBA

62103305
>>62102811
You dont have a choice so you better prefer right kek

62103311
>>62103051
would

62103312
>>62102932
Your mind will be healthier if you stop thinking so much about this stuff

62103338
>>62103107
There's an ai watermark in the bottom right corner

Society is cooked when people like you don't think hard enough for yourselves

62103341
>>62102932
i have never smelled a bad woman other than africans and hispanic (central america)

62103355
>>62102780
Left is so sexy god damn.

62103360
>>62103338
>fooled by AI
>goes to AI to explain it
>AI convinces him it's even worse than it looks
kek

62103584
>>62103355
Aryan

62103598
>>62102780
thats some insane mogging wtf

62103612
>>62103584
Claryan.

62103730
>>62103598
yes.

62103773
>>62102780
Going to see a movie with my dad :)

62104120
>>62102824
based and rebis-pilled

62105016
>>62102780
who is the booba babe white chick?

62105078
>>62102820
You know it brother.

62105090
>>62102780
The one on the left is objectively better looking. The problem is she's full of negro cum and anti-depressants.

62105116
>>62102780
Brvtal mog.

62105132
>>62102780
lmao how are you dumb fuck falling for this ai? this place really is filled with jeets

62105197
>>62105132
I thought it was real but staged. I didn't know it was completely computer-generated. That's quite scary. You may be a terminally online neckbeard genius who can tell the difference but most people can't.

62105641
>>62102780
code?

item.title: Why aren’t you holding BTC? — 78 replies — 19.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren’t you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-04-11 23:36 UTC

OP

If you’re still watching or waiting to buy BTC, why not do it now?
>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

Early replies (first 3)

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62097887
>>62096116
yeah these all or nothing people are mentally ill

62099195
>>62097432
>>62097583
I have 0.33 bitcoin via ETFs in a Roth. We'll see where it is in three decades.

62099777
>>62091414
Ok but it's pumping lately

62100009
>>62096707
you're only looking for headaches if you want that way. Most protocols are only rugging us inside job

62100014
>>62099195
You need 10bitcoins if you're in your 30s

62100192
>>62100009
Yeah, plenty of rugs out there, but not everything is some random anon farm. a16z and Ledger wouldn’t get involved if there wasn’t real potential here.

62100194
>>62091478
we're all here to make money lol

62100201
>>62087937
I unironically only buy LINK
not shilling, don't give a shit anymore, I'm just going to keep stacking it for my kids to use for collateralised loans when DeFi goes maistream

62100233
>>62100201
You're shilling chainglink

62100295
>>62099777
when 2x

62100334
>>62087937
I'm all in on BTC, nothing else, I staked some, most especially now that TBV is gaining traction and most BTCFI are keeping BTC native, I believe this is a huge chance BTC hit 200K this year

62100530
>>62087937
I do and my boomer index funds like spy are outperforming it. So do my PM`s. The only reason I hold is because its tax free after 12 months, thats literally and unironically it.

62101348
>>62100334
Makes sense. Once TBVs integrate with Aave V4, BTC collateral demand could scale quickly and unlock much deeper liquidity in BTCFi.

62101354
>>62091551
You can't judge based on that lol

62101365
>>62091723
that’s basically how all markets work when you think about it.

62102223
>>62100192
Ledger is cool

62102233
>>62100530
Wtf is that

62102249
>>62101348
I see aave v3 is better

62102256
>>62100233
Shylink shitlink

62102324
>>62102223
Yeah and being able to interact with DeFi there with millions of users while keeping self custody makes everything feel a lot safer and more seamless.

62102341
>>62091734
You should have ordered healthy foodies kek

62102346
>>62102233
a teenager

62102364
>>62102249
V3 is solid. V4 just went live a few weeks ago. Deposits are still ramping up. Kinda pointless comparing that to years of development. Give it time anon.

62102377
>>62095458
reread it anon

62102716
>>62087997
I made this same mistake in the last cycle. Trust me, all the liquidity will go into BTC, so it's better to buy and keep it on TBVs for yield instead of going for alts

62103228
>>62097432
The smuggest are newfags because they're trying to build their own conviction by mimicking the toxic maximalsm during the fork wars. The oldfags have either all left or have the ability to laugh at one's own expense. Bitcoin still hasn't done anything meaningful and "orange pilling" your retarded friends doesn't help. I consider myself a closet maxi because I do believe in bitcoin but I'd never associate with them or go to a meetup/conference.

62103805
>>62095600
For many bullish reasons

62103981
>>62095620
And are you expecting what then?

62105081
>>62100014
Depends on your goal.

62105096
I DCA into Bitcoin. It can either go up or it can either go down. I'd rather take my chances than holding gold for 30 years for a +1k profit
